info.description: The User Upload connector enables customers, suppliers, and/or MSP partner administrators to upload multiple users into SAP Fieldglass, replacing the need for entering user adds, updates, and deletes one by one through the application’s user interface. In some situations, the User Upload allows customers that are currently using an HRIS application to maintain employee data in that system and utilize this upload to pass the pertinent data for user accounts to SAP Fieldglass.
info.title: User Upload

hostname.description: The SAP Fieldglass region where the SAP Fieldglass APIs are used.

OAuth2.description: To use this REST API, you need to get OAuth client credentials (user credentials and client-specific application key) from an SAP Fieldglass account representative. After that, you need to pass the obtained client credentials to the SAP Fieldglass token endpoint to obtain an access token.

post.summary: This connector may be used by customers, suppliers, and/or MSP Partner Administrators to upload multiple users into Fieldglass, replacing the need for entering user adds, updates, and deletes one by one through the application's user interface. In some situations, it allows customers that are currently using an HRIS application to maintain employee data in that system and utilize this upload to pass the pertinent data for user accounts to Fieldglass.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

TransactionID.description: Number of uploaded records: 0.\\nCompleted updating records

Deactivation Date.description:
Date for which a user is to be recorded as closed.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Default Legal Entity.description:
Default legal entity on user profile.
Company configuration "Enable Legal Entity" must be
enabled.
Should be one of the legal entities associated to this
user.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Work Item Assignment.description:
The SAP Fieldglass Username of the user from the buyer side
who can act on user?s work items after they are deleted.
Usernames are defined in the SAP Fieldglass system.
If left blank, this field will default to the user?s
supervisor.

Account.description:
The valid Account Name as defined in the SAP Fieldglass
system from supplier side.
If left blank in update mode, this field retains its old
value.

Default Cost Center.description:
The Cost Center Code as defined in the SAP Fieldglass system.
The Default Cost Center identifies the preferred cost center
of the user and what data the user has access to in SAP
Fieldglass.
*Not required for bulk upload. Defaults to company
configuration.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

PMO User.description:
PMO user (User with Can Act As Coordinator/Distributor) - All
Program Office users in the company will have visibility. 
If left blank, then defaults to No.

Time Zone.description:
The time zone in which the user prefers items to be
tracked.
If left blank in add mode, it defaults to buyer?s default
setting for time zone. 
If left blank in update mode, the app will retain the old
value.

User will receive Ask an Expert (Service.description:
This field is applicable only if buyer has enabled plug-in
?Ask an Expert (Contingent)?. Determines if user can receive
Ask an Expert (Contingent) questions.

Default Site.description:
The Site Code as defined in the SAP Fieldglass system. The
default site identifies the preferred site of the user and
what data the user has access to in SAP Fieldglass.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Question (Services).description:
This field is applicable only if buyer has enabled plug-in
?Ask an Expert (Contingent)?. Question that will appear if
user has permission to Ask an Expert (Contingent)
questions.

Role Name.description:
The user role as defined in the SAP Fieldglass system. The
user role defines what access and security privileges the
user has.

View History Tab.description:
The History tab will display in clear text all fields that
have been changed, whether the fields are masked or hidden
to this user when creating or viewing the document.

Email Format.description:
Email format preference of the user.
If left blank in add mode, it will default to the email
format of the buyer
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Manage Personally Identifiable Informati.description:
Indicates if the user can access personal identifiable
information on several modules.

Send Work Item Digest.description:
Determines if the user wishes to receive work items at
scheduled time.
Only applicable if company configuration ?Enable Email
Digest? for Work Items is enabled.

View Restricted Attachments.description: Indicates if user can view restricted attachments.

Manage Site Configurations.description:
Determines if the user can edit site configurations.
When left blank, in add mode, this field defaults to No. If
left blank in update mode, this field retains its old
setting.

Modification Type.description:
A = Add
U = Update
D = Delete
Blank ? When an existing username is entered, SAP Fieldglass
identifies it as an update. When new username is entered,
SAP Fieldglass identifies it as an Add.
In case of full bulk upload, modification type is not
required.

View and Report on Sensitive Data.description:
If the company Config. ?Enable Security Information? and
?Display Security Information Masked (value is always
encrypted)? are enabled, and a user has ?View and Report on
Sensitive Data?, then this user can see unencrypted values
for Security ID and sensitive data for custom fields.

View Release Feature Admin.description:
Indicates SAP Fieldglass Feature Administration guide
(formerly the playbook) can be viewed by the user.

View Worker Personal Details.description:
Determines if user can see worker personal details.
This field is dependent upon the ?Suppress Worker Personal
Details? Site configuration. When this configuration is
enabled, if the field is left blank, it will default to No.
When this configuration is not enabled, this field should be
left blank.

Cost Center Access.description:
Determines the method for which cost center access will be
given to a user.
ALL = All cost centers will be associated with the user.
Build = As cost centers are used by users that are
subordinate to the user or appear on transactions requiring
the user?s approval, the user will be given access.
Associate = Cost centers must be explicitly associated with
the user on their profile in SAP Fieldglass.
If field left blank, value defaults to Associate.

Currency.description:
Determines the currency for the user. Values may only consist
of currencies already associated with the buyer. 
If left blank in add mode, it will default to default
currency of the buyer.
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Send Email Approval.description:
Indicates if the Email Approval message should be sent in
addition to the Work Items message. 
Company configuration ?Enable Email Digest? and 'Enable
Actionable Emails' must be enabled for this field to appear. 
Also 'Send Work Item Digest' should be Yes in order to view
this field.

Time Format.description:
Time format preference of the user.
If left blank in add mode, it will default to time format of
the buyer.
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Work Item.description:
Specifies if user would like to receive Work Item as an email
or not at all.
If no value is provided, Work Items will appear in SAP
Fieldglass, but no notifications will be sent to the
user.
None ? removes existing value.

City.description:
The user's city.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

MSP User.description:
Indicates if user belongs to an MSP company.Only
applicable for single MSP buyers.The 'Manage
Personally Identifiable Information' flag cannot be enabled
for MSP users.

Site Access.description:
Determines the method for which sites access will be given to
a user.
ALL = All sites will be associated with the user.
Build = As sites are used by users that are subordinate to
the user or appear on transactions requiring the user?s
approval, the user will be given access.
Associate = Sites must be explicitly associated with the user
on their profile in SAP Fieldglass.
If field left blank, value defaults to Associate.

cc Emails to.description:
Valid email address.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Hide Desktop Resource Wizard.description:
Yes: ?Show Resource Request Wizard? Flag on My Preference
will be disabled.
No: ?Show Resource Request Wizard? Flag on My Preference will
be enabled. 
If left blank, this field defaults to No.

Program Office will assist with Job Post.description:
Determines if the user will utilize the PMO assisted work
flow or the unassisted workflow for job postings.

State.description:
The user's state/province. Use the two-digit state code.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Job Code.description:
This field defines the job code the user can use on the job
posting. 
This field is optional. If a value is entered in this field,
it must match the value from a job code on the job templates
created by the company.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Country.description:
The user's country. For example, ?USA?. Refer to the Country
List for the complete list of valid values (Administration |
Company Data | Users | Create User | Country).
[Blank] will set field to blank.

First Work Items Digest Time.description:
Indicates scheduled time for work items to be sent to user
when Send Work Item Digest = ?Yes?.

Visualizer.description:
This field is applicable only if the buyer has enabled the
plug-in Visualizer. Determines if the user will utilize
Visualizer.

[sa] Default Currency Code.description:
Enter the user?s signature authority. This amount, along with
the primary supervisor information, is used for approval
chaining. 
For example, currency code: ?USD? should be ?[sa] USD?.
Signature authority for all other currencies associated to
the buyer will be derived from this value using the currency
conversion rates effective on that day.
0 (zero) will set field to zero. [Blank] will set field to
blank.

Question (Contingent).description:
This field is applicable only if buyer has enabled plug-in
?Ask an Expert (Contingent)?. Question that will appear if
user has permission to Ask an Expert (Contingent)
questions.

Number Format.description:
Determines the number format for the user.
If left blank in add mode, it will default to default number
format of the buyer.
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Scheduled Delivery Time for Notification.description:
Indicates scheduled time for notifications to be sent to user
when Send Notification Digest = ?Yes?.

Can this user act as Coordinator/Distrib.description:
Determines the MSP Coordinator Flag that dictates whether the
user may be assigned as a Coordinator and/or Distributor for
a business unit.

Employee ID.description:
The identifier appointed to the user by the buyer
company.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Legal Entities.description:
The Legal Entity as defined in the SAP Fieldglass system.
Multiple codes are separated by tilde (~).
Not necessary if 'Access to all Legal Entities' company
configuration enabled.

Prefix.description: The prefix of the user?s name.

County.description:
The user?s county.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Notification.description:
Specifies if user would like to receive notification message
as an email or not at all.
If no value is provided, Notifications, will appear in SAP
Fieldglass but will not be sent to the user.
None ? removes existing value.

[s] {Defined Supervisor List}.description:
Any defined supervisor list associated with the user. The
defined supervisor list field name should be prefixed with
?[s]?. For example, defined supervisor list field name:
?Financial Supervisor? should be ?[s] Financial Supervisor?.
The values will be the person?s username.
If an invalid username is assigned to the Defined Supervisor
field, a warning will display after the upload has run, but
the record will not fail. Instead, the supervisor will be
set as a null and may be corrected manually through the UI
or via a future upload.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Date Format.description:
Date format preference that will be displayed to user.
If left blank in add mode, it will default to date format of
the buyer.
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Mobile Number.description:
The user's mobile number.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Program Office will assist with RFX crea.description:
Determines if the user will utilize the PMO assisted workflow
or the unassisted workflow for RFXs.

Set Run As User.description: Indicates if the user can run reports as another user.

Language.description:
Determines the language for the user.
If left blank in add mode, it will default to default
language of the buyer.
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Broadcast.description:
Specifies if user would like to receive broadcast message as
an email or not at all.
If no value is provided, broadcast messages will appear in
SAP Fieldglass, but will not be sent directly to the
user.
None ? removes existing value.

Star.description:
Yes = Notifications of items being starred will be sent via
email to the user.
No/Blank = No notifications will be sent when starring
occurs.
User permissions must be enabled for this.

PMO Dashboard.description:
This field is applicable only if buyer has enabled the
plug-in PMO Dashboard. Determines if the user will utilize
the PMO Dashboard.

Show Home Page Announcement.description:
Determines if user will see announcements on his/her Home
Page. 
User permissions must be enabled for this.

Display Name.description:
How the user?s name should be displayed throughout the
application.
If left blank for Add, the user?s display name will default
to the 'Last Name, First Name' format. If left blank for
Update, this field retains its value.

User will receive Ask an Expert (Conting.description:
This field is applicable only if the buyer has enabled
plug-in ?Ask an Expert (Contingent)?. Determines if user can
receive Ask an Expert (Contingent) questions.

Scheduler will assist with Interview and.description:
Determines if the user can submit Interviews/Meetings to
supplier.
If left blank, this field defaults to No.

Can Sign / Attach Activity Item Contract.description:
Determines if the user can electronically sign and attach the
contract.
See Configuration Considerations section for more
information.

Primary Business Unit.description:
The Business Unit Code as defined in the SAP Fieldglass
system. The business unit identifies what data the user has
access to in SAP Fieldglass, as well as the approval groups
that are executed.

Reminder.description:
This field (flag) is applicable only if buyer has enabled
Reminder config.
Yes: Reminder under Messaging section in My Preferences will
be enabled for email.
No: Reminder under Messaging section in My Preferences will
be disabled for email.
If left blank or column is not present in the upload file,
this field defaults to No.

Access To Multi-Tenant Data.description:
This field (flag) is applicable only if the buyer has enabled
the ?Access To Multi-Tenant Data? configuration.
When left blank, then defaults to No. This field (flag)
cannot be enabled for Admin users.

Can be Selected to Electronically Sign a.description:
Indicates if the user can be selected to electronically sign
a document.
Company Config. 'Enable eSignature Provider' must be enabled
and eSignature Provider must be either 'DocuSign' or
'TrustSeed'.

ZIP/Postal Code.description:
The user's postal code/zip code. Both 5- and 9-digit codes
are accepted.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Business Unit Access.description:
Determines the method for which business unit access will be
given to a user.
ALL = All business units will be associated with the
user.
Build = As business units are used by users that are
subordinate to the user or appear on transactions requiring
the user?s approval, the user will be given access.
Associate = Business units must be explicitly associated with
the user on their profile in SAP Fieldglass.
If field left blank, value defaults to Associate.

Title.description:
The user?s job title.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Second Work Items Digest Time.description:
Indicates a second scheduled time for work items to be sent
to user when Send Work Item Digest = ?Yes?.
Second Work Item Digest Time must be greater than First Work
Item Digest Time by at least two hours.

Receive Notifications via Email Before R.description:
If this field left blank, it defaults to No.
If No is selected, the user will receive the first email
notification that SAP Fieldglass generates for the user.
Subsequent regular notifications will only be sent when the
user has registered. In addition to the first email
notification generated by the system, the user will also be
sent regular registration notifications. 
If Yes is selected, the user will receive email notifications
even if the user has not registered in SAP Fieldglass. 
This field is displayed if the Notification-Email option is
selected in the Messaging section of the user profile.
This field will remain hidden and will default to 'Yes'
when:

The email field is unchecked for both
Notification and Work Item in the messaging
section of the user profile.


 OR


Either the Notification or Work Item is checked and
Login Authorization Type is set to anything other
than Password Authentication.

Login Type.description:
Determines login authorization type of the user.
If left blank in add mode, it will default to authorization
type set for buyer.
If left blank in update mode, it retains the old value.

Send Notification Digest.description:
Determines if the user wishes to receive notifications at a
scheduled time.
Only applicable if company configuration ?Enable Email
Digest? for Notifications is enabled.

Chat (Services).description:
Yes = Chat messages for services documents will be sent to
user as emails in addition to displayed in the
application.
No/Blank = Chat messages will only appear in the application
and user will not be notified via email when they
arrive.
User permissions must be enabled for this.

User Can Access All Legal Entities.description:
This field (flag) is applicable only if buyer has enabled
?Legal Entity? config.
This field (flag) indicates if the user has access to all of
the division codes. 
If left blank, this field defaults to No.

Chat (Contingent).description:
Yes = Chat messages for contingent documents will be sent to
user as emails in addition to displayed in the
application.
No/Blank = Chat messages will only appear in the application
and user will not be notified via email when they
arrive.
User permissions must be enabled for this.

Address 2.description:
The user's address, Line 2.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Username.description:
The user's SAP Fieldglass username. This item must be unique
to the system (not just the buyer). SAP Fieldglass
recommends the user?s email address as the username.
For Bulk Full version, this key field must be in the first
position. See the Configuration Considerations section for
more information.

Address 1.description:
The user's address, Line 1.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Primary Supervisor Username.description:
The SAP Fieldglass username of the user?s primary supervisor
from the buyer side, which is used for escalation and
notifications. Usernames are defined in the SAP Fieldglass
system.

Fax Number.description:
The user's fax number.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

[c] {User Custom Field X}.description:
Any custom field associated with the user module. The custom
field name should be prefixed with ?[c]?. For example,
custom field name: ?User Custom Field 1? should be ?[c] User
Custom Field 1?.
Valid values of the custom field are configured during the
setup of the SAP Fieldglass system.
Do not include this field if it is not being used.

Alert.description:
Determines if user would like to receive email of the alerts
or not at all. 
None ? removes existing value.

Phone Number.description:
The user's phone number.
[Blank] will set field to blank.

Start Day for the Calendar Widget.description:
Specifies the first day of the week in the calendar widgets
that pop up next to date fields in the application.
If left blank, Start Date will default to Sunday.

Use Flexible Sourcing.description:
Flexible Sourcing allows the user to compare rate information
for different sites and suppliers before creating a job
posting.
Yes: When a user with the user profile flag ?Use Flexible
Sourcing? enabled creates a job posting and selects a Job
Posting Template with the rule creator ?Can Use Flexible
Sourcing? selected, the Flexible Sourcing feature is
automatically invoked. 
NO: Set to Default.
If left blank, this field defaults to No.
